title: Touch up minor vehicle paintwork damage
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Touch up minor vehicle paintwork damage demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to apply paint touch-ups

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret touch-up information1.3 Select and inspect paint materials for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify required paint touch-up techniques and methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret touch-up information1.3 Select and inspect paint materials for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify required paint touch-up techniques and methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret touch-up information1.3 Select and inspect paint materials for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify required paint touch-up techniques and methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to apply paint touch-ups

elements.title: Apply touch-up paint

pcs.text: Clean and prepare surface area for touch-up paint using approved abrasive and cleaning materials2.2 Prepare and match touch-up paint materials according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Apply touch-up paint to scratched or damaged area using recommended tools and equipment and according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Sand touch-up paint area using approved abrasives and polish2.5 Apply glaze and sealant to touched up paint area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and prepare surface area for touch-up paint using approved abrasive and cleaning materials2.2 Prepare and match touch-up paint materials according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Apply touch-up paint to scratched or damaged area using recommended tools and equipment and according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Sand touch-up paint area using approved abrasives and polish2.5 Apply glaze and sealant to touched up paint area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and prepare surface area for touch-up paint using approved abrasive and cleaning materials2.2 Prepare and match touch-up paint materials according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Apply touch-up paint to scratched or damaged area using recommended tools and equipment and according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Sand touch-up paint area using approved abrasives and polish2.5 Apply glaze and sealant to touched up paint area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Apply touch-up paint

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes
